'''thagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:obdurantly|obdurantly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obdurantly|obdurantly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thagate|thagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thagatesher|thagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thagatesherĂ«m|thagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thagatero|thagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thagateshĂ«|thagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thagateshĂ«m|thagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithagatero|gokithagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithagateshĂ«|gokithagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithagateshĂ«m|gokithagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothagankerom|gothagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothagankeshĂ«|gothagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothagankeshĂ«m|gothagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothagankeya|gothagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thagaterom|thagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thagatemu|thagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thagateya|thagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithagaterom|gokithagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithagatemu|gokithagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithagateya|gokithagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thagagate|thagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thagagatesher|thagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thagagatesherĂ«m|thagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thagagatero|thagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thagagateshĂ«|thagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thagagateshĂ«m|thagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithagagatero|gokithagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithagagateshĂ«|gokithagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithagagateshĂ«m|gokithagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothagagankerom|gothagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothagagankeshĂ«|gothagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothagagankeshĂ«m|gothagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothagagankeya|gothagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thagagaterom|thagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thagagatemu|thagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thagagateya|thagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithagagaterom|gokithagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithagagatemu|gokithagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithagagateya|gokithagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠgĂŠte|thĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠgĂŠtesher|thĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠgĂŠtero|thĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠgĂŠtero|gokithĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠgĂŠterom|thĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠgĂŠtemu|thĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠgĂŠteya|thĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠgĂŠterom|gokithĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠgĂŠteya|gokithĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafgafte|thafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafgaftesher|thafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafgaftesherĂ«m|thafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafgaftero|thafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafgafteshĂ«|thafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafgafteshĂ«m|thafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafgaftero|gokithafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafgafteshĂ«|gokithafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafgafteshĂ«m|gokithafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafgafnkerom|gothafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafgafnkeshĂ«|gothafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafgafnkeshĂ«m|gothafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafgafnkeya|gothafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafgafterom|thafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafgaftemu|thafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafgafteya|thafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafgafterom|gokithafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafgaftemu|gokithafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafgafteya|gokithafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
